## Source: amazon-inspector (757aca74d8d75ecde7421f2c632969a5b34c11a279d9d28b75755c2ca0825ceb)
The package mrdaa-frontend was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (ca0f1691dee1aebef2c443074b613ccf344f0af7812cc9a434b270649523ed6e)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'mrdaa-frontend' @ 99.2.1 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
